S02 E14 — The Ape Adam and Little Joe warn Hoss when he tries to help Arnie, a man with the mind of a child and an uncontrollable temper.
programme.title: Bonanza

programme.desc: Two Montana cowboys (Jerry Reed, Tom Selleck) head for Nashville and help a woman (Morgan Fairchild) find her sister.
programme.title: The Concrete Cowboys

programme.desc: The nation's capital faces a bizarre political scandal when a top presidential aide suffers a severe personality change.
programme.title: The Werewolf of Washington

programme.desc: The arrival of wealthy bachelors in town causes an uproar when families with single daughters aggressively seek engagements, including the Bennet family, with five eligible daughters.
programme.title: Pride and Prejudice

programme.desc: A British gentleman's (Laurence Olivier) innocent bride (Joan Fontaine) grapples with intrusive reminders of his deceased wife.
programme.title: Rebecca

programme.desc: The Tabernacle Choir at Temple Square performs songs of hope, faith and inspiration; singing sacred hymns both new and old from around the world as well as uplifting selections from the American songbook.
programme.title: Music & the Spoken Word

programme.desc: Superspy Derek Flint (James Coburn), agent of Z.O.W.I.E., stops a geothermal plot to control the world's weather.
programme.title: Our Man Flint

programme.desc: A tracker (Sammy Davis Jr.) helps a white rancher (Ernest Borgnine) avenge his son and rescue his daughter.
programme.title: The Trackers

programme.desc: A lusty Greek peasant (Anthony Quinn) shows a British writer (Alan Bates) how to live and run a lignite mine.
programme.title: Zorba the Greek

programme.desc: A modern-day blacksmith becomes the toast of King Arthur's court after being transported to sixth-century England.
programme.title: A Connecticut Yankee in King Arthur's Court

programme.desc: A bounty hunter (Glenn Ford) faces his son's killers with help from the son (Michael Burns) of an outlaw he has killed.
programme.title: Santee

programme.desc: A clumsy young man nurtures a plant and discovers that it's carnivorous, forcing him to kill to feed it.
programme.title: The Little Shop of Horrors

programme.desc: John Adams (William Daniels), Benjamin Franklin (Howard da Silva) and Thomas Jefferson (Ken Howard) lead the way to the Colonies' Declaration of Independence.
Three retired Texas Rangers rescue a former colleague and eventually become the sheriff and deputies of Waco.
programme.title: The Over-the-Hill Gang Rides Again

programme.desc: A reporter writes a fictitious column about a man named John Doe, who claims to despair at America's neglect of the little people and plans to kill himself. To maintain the ruse, the newspaper hires a ballplayer-turned-hobo to pose as John Doe.
programme.title: Meet John Doe

programme.desc: A teenager (Tuesday Weld) wants to wear a strapless gown to the prom.
programme.title: Rock, Rock, Rock!

programme.desc: A stewardess (Doris Day) runs for her life once she realizes her second husband (Louis Jourdan) killed her first.
programme.title: Julie

programme.desc: Little Alice (Fiona Fullerton) falls into a strange land and meets the White Rabbit (Michael Crawford), March Hare (Peter Sellers) and other odd characters out of Lewis Carroll's story.
programme.title: Alice's Adventures in Wonderland

programme.desc: Dorothy tries to save her dog from a storm and eases on down the road to see the Wiz with Tin Man, Scarecrow and Cowardly Lion.
programme.title: The Wiz

programme.desc: A lawyer (Ginger Rogers) bails out and then marries a Hollywood tough guy (Jack Carson) who's a milquetoast in real life.
programme.title: The Groom Wore Spurs

programme.desc: An armchair explorer (Bob Hope), a G-woman (Edie Adams), and a Soviet spy (Anita Ekberg) and her colleague go on safari for a lost moon capsule.
programme.title: Call Me Bwana

programme.desc: A framed sheriff (John McIntire) is about to hang, but his bogus wayward daughters have a plan.
programme.title: The New Daughters of Joshua Cabe

programme.desc: Jelly from Venus turns into the Ymir, a tailed creature that keeps growing and ends up on the loose in Rome.
programme.title: 20 Million Miles to Earth

programme.title: Rick Renner
programme.desc: Rick Renner is widely known for his interpretation of the Greek New Testament and his engaging teaching style. His teaching is punctuated by a unique ability to draw vividly descriptive word pictures from the Greek that illuminate the Scriptures in a fresh, new way. Rick also distinctively shares Bible principles through contemporary illustrations set against an extensive cultural and historical backdrop of New Testament times. In each episode of “Rick Renner,” Rick teaches in-depth on a passage of Scripture verse by verse, centered around a specific theme that is vitally relevant to the lives of believers who are hungry to dig deeper into the treasures of God’s Word. For more information, visit http://www.renner.org.

Down-to-earth, refreshing, sometimes unfiltered and always sharing the life-changing love of Jesus thru Paula’s in-depth teaching or Jon’s anointed music. About Paula Paula White-Cain is the President of Paula White Ministries and City of Destiny headquartered in Apopka, Florida, and the spiritual advisor to President Donald Trump. She hosts Paula Today, a nationally syndicated daily broadcast reaching a potential audience of 5.7 billion people in over 200 countries. She is a leading Pastor, a renowned life coach, bestselling author, and highly sought-after motivational speaker. Paula’s commitment to humanity is felt worldwide as she reaches out through numerous charities and compassion ministries, fulfilling her mission and call to transform lives, heal hearts and win souls. She lives in the Orlando area with her husband, Jonathan Cain.

programme.title: Bible Coaching
programme.desc: There are tens of thousands of personal development books out there, but for me, the Bible is the foundation of wisdom, strength, and direction for every chapter of life. In this episode, we explore how Scripture gives us real guidance for healing, courage, discipline, purpose, and moving forward with confidence. We reflect on Philippians chapter 3, verses 13–14, where Paul reminds us to let go of what’s behind and press forward toward what God has ahead. This is more than inspiration—it’s a powerful life strategy for anyone ready to grow, change, and step into their next chapter.

programme.title: 2026 Make it your Best
programme.desc: Welcome to 2026 — a new chapter, not because the calendar has changed, but because you have the opportunity to choose differently. programme.title: 2026 Year of Spiritual Alignment
programme.desc: In this Life Coaching Session we delve into the deeper currents of your being. This is an invitation into stillness, a chance to realign with your true purpose and inner wisdom. It is about understanding that you are always guided and supported, even when the path ahead seems unclear. Your spiritual journey is unique.

programme.title: Bible Coaching

programme.title: Christian Coaching Session on New Beginnings-for-2026
programme.desc: This Christian life coaching session is rooted in biblical themes of new beginnings and God’s constant presence. The video offers calm guidance, spiritual encouragement, and practical life-coaching reflections to help you let go of the past and invite God into your everyday life. If you’re feeling stuck, tired, or uncertain about the future, this session is designed to bring reassurance, clarity, and hope — reminding you that you don’t have to walk your journey alone. Life coaching is a practical goal-setting process, and when supported by faith and spirituality, it has the power unimaginable.
